Skill Path: Intrigue

You understand to use spoken words to weave intrigues and conspiracies.

While developing your skills in Deception you chose to focus specifically on Intrigue, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.wbjTkaKRygpaZS0r]{Secret Speech}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.uF0ATN2Zw1Q67ew2]{Discreet Inquiry}.

This path focuses on Language-based deception.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.wbjTkaKRygpaZS0r]{Secret Speech}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.uF0ATN2Zw1Q67ew2]{Discreet Inquiry}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.bmtf49jRKBCfdC5W]{Half-Truths}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.qibU5SZPFHMNnpAP]{Doublespeak}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.XZcd1wFHy111klu2]{Reveal Machinations}
